summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin Panel ERP-Lite Enhancement features. All 28 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing verified all ERP features: Dashboard KPIs, Invoice Management, Reports Module, ERP Settings, and Customer ERP View.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

backend: Admin login rejection with invalid credentials (401)
ERP Dashboard KPIs - all fields present (total_orders, revenue, products, customers, invoices)
GET /api/erp/orders - returns orders list with pagination
GET /api/erp/invoices with status filter (unpaid, paid, partial)
GET /api/erp/customers/{id} - customer detail with orders and invoices
Dashboard to Invoice integration - count verification
frontend: Admin login redirects to /admin (ERP Dashboard)
ERP Dashboard displays all KPIs (orders, revenue, products, customers)
ERP Dashboard shows Monthly Revenue chart
ERP Dashboard shows Order Status Distribution pie chart
Quick Actions section with all ERP navigation links
Recent Orders section with order list
Invoice Summary section with total/unpaid/overdue counts
Inventory Overview with stock value and alerts
Invoice Management - page navigation from Quick Actions
Invoice Management - Create Invoice button and modal
Invoice Management - Filter buttons (All, Unpaid, Partial, Paid, Overdue)
Invoice Management - Summary cards (Total, Amount, Collected, Outstanding)
Invoice Management - Invoice table with action buttons (Download, Send, Payment)
Reports Module - Report type selection sidebar
Reports Module - Date range inputs
Reports Module - Generate and CSV export buttons
Reports Module - Sales report data display
ERP Settings - Company tab with logo upload
ERP Settings - Invoice, Payment, Bank Details tabs
ERP Settings - Company fields (name, address, phone, email, VAT)
ERP Settings - Save Settings button
Customer ERP View - Customer list with pagination
Customer ERP View - Filter buttons (All, High Value, Pending Payments)
Customer ERP View - Search functionality
Customer ERP View - Summary cards
Customer ERP View - Eye icon for customer details

critical_code_review_comments: All ERP backend APIs are working correctly and return expected data structures
Frontend routes for ERP features are properly configured in App.js
Invoice PDF generation works using reportlab library
All ERP pages have proper authentication checks (redirect to login if not admin)
Minor: Add aria-describedby to DialogContent in InvoiceManagement.js for accessibility
seed_data_creation: Test invoice created via API during testing (INV-0001 already existed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: ERP-Lite Enhancement features fully implemented and tested. All backend APIs working: /api/erp/dashboard/kpis, /api/erp/invoices (CRUD + PDF + email + payment), /api/erp/reports/generate (6 report types), /api/erp/settings (GET/PUT), /api/erp/customers (list + detail), /api/erp/orders/timeline. Frontend pages all accessible via Quick Actions from ERP Dashboard: Invoice Management at /admin/erp/invoices, Reports at /admin/erp/reports, ERP Settings at /admin/erp/settings, Customer ERP View at /admin/erp/customers. Invoice INV-0001 exists with partial payment status (AED 10 of AED 128.95 paid).

features_verified.erp_dashboard_kpis: PASS - All KPIs display correctly (orders, revenue, products, customers, invoices, charts)
features_verified.invoice_management: PASS - Create, list, filter, PDF download, email send, record payment all working
features_verified.reports_module: PASS - All 6 report types (sales, invoice, payments, products, customers, stock) with JSON/CSV export
features_verified.erp_settings: PASS - Company, Invoice, Payment, Bank Details tabs with save functionality
features_verified.customer_erp_view: PASS - Customer list with filters, search, and detail view modal
features_verified.order_timeline: PASS - Order timeline API returns timeline data

mocked_integrations.email_sending: MOCKED - SendGrid API key not configured, emails may not be delivered
